name: Content Performance Dashboard
description: Know which landing pages and content assets actually convert, influence pipeline, and close revenue, and which are just traffic.
alsoSurfaces: Which content assets are actually moving deals forward?
Where do prospects engage and then go silent?
Which assets get views but never produce conversions?
How does content engagement differ by buyer persona?
beforeWeRun: Define "content asset": landing pages only, or include eBooks, blogs, demos?
Conversion benchmark: form fills, demo requests, or downstream pipeline?

whatYoullGet.name: Asset-level KPIs
whatYoullGet.desc: Views, time-on-page, form fills, downstream MQLs, pipeline influenced.

whatYoullGet.name: Top influencers on closed-won
whatYoullGet.desc: Assets that touched closed-won deals, ranked by frequency and recency.

whatYoullGet.name: Vanity vs. converted
whatYoullGet.desc: High-traffic pages that never produce conversions.

whatYoullGet.name: Persona engagement matrix
whatYoullGet.desc: Which assets pull which personas: visualized.

whatYoullGet.name: Drill-down
whatYoullGet.desc: Click any asset for visitor flow, conversion paths, and influenced opps.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your content dashboard in ~9 min.
